Full-Time
Working at Taazaa involves engaging with cutting-edge technology and innovative software solutions in a collaborative environment. We emphasize on continuous professional growth, offering workshops and training. Our employees often interact with clients to tailor solutions to business needs, working on diverse projects across industries. We promote work-life balance with flexible hours and remote options, fostering a supportive and inclusive culture. Competitive salaries, health benefits, and various perks further enhance the work experience.
Looking ahead, we aim to expand our technological capabilities and market reach, investing in advanced technologies and expanding our service offerings. We plan to deepen our expertise in AI and machine learning, enhance our cloud services, and continue fostering a culture of innovation and excellence. Taazaa is committed to staying at the forefront of technology trends, ensuring it delivers impactful and transformative solutions for its clients.
We are seeking an AI Lead with strong expertise in LLMs, RAG architectures, embeddings, and agent-based frameworks. The ideal candidate should have solid machine learning fundamentals, system design experience, and hands-on exposure to building API-driven, microservices-based, cloud-native solutions. This role requires the ability to architect scalable AI systems, guide model integration into production, and lead and mentor engineering teams. A strategic mindset with a passion for innovation and technical excellence is essential.
What you’ll do
AI Strategy & Ownership
Execute the roadmap aligned with business and engineering goals
Drive adoption of AI-first and agent-driven architectures
Establish the standards, patterns, and governance
Model Development & AI Engineering
Train, fine-tune, and evaluate LLMs and classical ML models
Design embeddings, RAG pipelines, and evaluation frameworks
Optimize prompt strategies and cost-performance tradeoffs
Agent & System Integration
Design AI agents that interact with databases, APIs, and workflows
Integrate AI into microservices and SaaS platforms
Define agent pipelines, tool calling, memory, and observability patterns
Platform, Infra & MLOps
Productionize AI workloads with DevOps teams
Establish MLOps practices, including monitoring and model versioning
People Leadership & Enablement
Build and groom AI engineering teams
Coach developers to become AI-augmented full-stack thinkers
Track initiatives using clear goals and KPIs
Stakeholder Collaboration
Partner with Product, Sales, and Pre-sales teams
Act as an internal and external AI evangelist
Your qualifications
Technical
LLMs, RAG, embeddings, and agent frameworks
Strong ML fundamentals and system design
API, microservices, and cloud-native experience
Proven leadership and mentoring capability
Behavioral
Here are five essential behavioral skills  should possess:
Effective Communication: Clearly and concisely convey ideas, requirements, and feedback to team members, stakeholders, and clients, fostering an environment of open dialogue and mutual understanding.
Leadership and Mentorship: Inspire and guide the development team, providing support and encouragement, while promoting a culture of continuous learning and improvement.
Problem-Solving Attitude: Approach challenges with a proactive mindset, quickly identifying issues and developing innovative solutions to overcome obstacles.
Collaboration and Teamwork: Work well within a team, encouraging collaboration and valuing diverse perspectives to achieve common goals and deliver high-quality results.
Adaptability and Flexibility: Stay adaptable in a fast-paced, dynamic environment, effectively managing changing priorities and requirements while maintaining focus on project objectives.
Joining Taazaa Tech means thriving in a dynamic, innovative environment with competitive compensation and performance-based incentives. You'll have ample opportunities for professional growth through workshops and certifications, while enjoying a flexible work-life balance with remote options. Our collaborative culture fosters creativity and exposes you to diverse projects across industries. We offer clear career advancement pathways, comprehensive health benefits, and perks like team-building activities.
Taazaa Tech is a kaleidoscope of innovation, where every idea is a brushstroke on the canvas of tomorrow. It's a symphony of talent, where creativity dances with technology to orchestrate solutions beyond imagination. In this vibrant ecosystem, challenges are sparks igniting the flames of innovation, propelling us towards new horizons.

We are looking for a  for our AI initiatives. You will be part of a very fast moving team distributed across the globe. You will bridge the gap between high-level AI research and industrial-grade production systems. This is a role for a T-Shaped engineer: someone with deep expertise in LLMs, machine learning and mathematics, but with the broad proficiency across DevOps, databases, and microservices needed to turn experimental models into stable, scalable products.
As a senior member of the team, you will drive Engineering Excellence, setting up the architectural benchmarks that allow our AI solutions to be resilient, compliant, and market-ready.
What you’ll do
AI Orchestration & Agentic Systems
Design and implement complex, stateful agentic workflows using LangGraph and LangChain.
Implement tool calling and Model Context Protocol (MCP) to securely connect models to diverse data sources and tools.
Optimize high-throughput model serving using vLLM or similar high-performance engines.
Engineering Excellence & Mentorship
Establish and enforce high-quality coding standards and modular architectural patterns across the AI stack.
Lead by example through rigorous code reviews and hands-on technical guidance, fostering a culture of technical rigor and production readiness.
Data Engineering & Database Design
Architect scalable database schemas (SQL, NoSQL, and Vector) optimized for RAG, hybrid search, and real-time analytics.
Build and maintain robust data pipelines that ensure high data quality for model training and evaluation.
Platform, MLOps & Compliance
Own the containerization (Docker/Kubernetes) and deployment of AI workloads on public and private clouds.
Ensure all systems meet strict regulatory requirements, including HIPAA, GDPR, and CCPA.
Implement MLOps practices, including automated testing for AI outputs and performance monitoring.
Your qualifications
Technical
Frameworks: Expert proficiency with LLM SDKs, ML frameworks like PyTorch or TensorFlow (Keras is welcome); mastery of LangChain and LangGraph is a plus.
Systems: Strong hands-on experience with Python, SQL, Docker, and Microservices architecture. Experience with Kubernetes is a plus.
Math & Stats: A solid fundamental understanding of Mathematics and Statistics (Linear Algebra, Probability, and Statistical Significance) that underpins modern neural networks.
Cloud: Proven experience managing workloads within a public cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure, etc.) ecosystem.
Regulatory: Practical experience building in HIPAA or GDPR/CCPA compliant environments.
Behavioral
Here are five essential behavioral skills Artificial Intelligence (AI) Lead should possess:
Effective Communication: Clearly and concisely convey ideas, requirements, and feedback to team members, stakeholders, and clients, fostering an environment of open dialogue and mutual understanding.
Leadership and Mentorship: Inspire and guide the development team, providing support and encouragement, while promoting a culture of continuous learning and improvement.
Problem-Solving Attitude: Approach challenges with a proactive mindset, quickly identifying issues and developing innovative solutions to overcome obstacles.
Collaboration and Teamwork: Work well within a team, encouraging collaboration and valuing diverse perspectives to achieve common goals and deliver high-quality results.
Adaptability and Flexibility: Stay adaptable in a fast-paced, dynamic environment, effectively managing changing priorities and requirements while maintaining focus on project objectives.

We are seeking a highly skilled Digital Analytics Analyst / Adobe Analytics Specialist with strong expertise across the Adobe Experience Platform (AEP), including Adobe Analytics, Adobe Customer Journey, Analytics (CJA), Adobe Launch (Tags), and Adobe Web SDK. This role blends strategic digital marketing analytics, advanced data analysis, and hands-on technical implementation. You will work closely with marketing, product, engineering, and data teams to design, implement, analyze, and optimize digital measurement solutions across web and mobile platforms, transforming complex datasets into meaningful, actionable insights.
What you’ll do
Analytics, Insights & Strategy
● Analyze historical traffic trends, search trends, and end-to-end customer journeys across digital channels.
● Develop and maintain benchmarking, trending, and KPI frameworks to support customer experience and business objectives.
● Identify behavioral patterns and performance trends to optimize user engagement and conversion.
● Conduct ad-hoc and deep-dive analyses to support initiatives and stakeholder decision-making..
Adobe Analytics & Customer Journey Analytics (CJA)
● Design, build, and maintain dashboards, reports, segments, and calculated metrics in Adobe Analytics and Adobe Customer Journey Analytics (CJA).
● Leverage CJA and Adobe Experience Platform (AEP) to unify cross-channel and cross-device customer data.
● Design and maintain Experience Data Model (XDM) schemas and event structures to support scalable, accurate customer journey analysis.
● Translate business and measurement requirements into XDM-compliant data models, in collaboration with marketing, product, and engineering teams.
● Support AEP development and enhancements, including data modeling, schema alignment, dataset configuration, and data quality validation.
● Utilize AEP sandboxes to segregate data across environments (e.g., development, QA, production).
● Support multi-sandbox governance models, including:
○ Shared sandboxes for standardized datasets and centralized reporting
○ Isolated sandboxes for experimentation, regional initiatives, or team-specific use cases
● Ensure consistency, accuracy, and governance across Adobe Analytics and CJA reporting.
Technical Implementation & Tag Management
● Define the design and implementation of digital analytics tracking, tagging, and targeting for web and mobile applications.
● Implement and support data collection using Adobe Web SDK, including event design and validation of Web SDK payloads against XDM schemas.
● Provide technical requirements, tracking specifications, and implementation guidance to frontend and backend development teams.
● Implement and maintain tags using Adobe Launch (Tags), including pixel, conversion, and link tracking.
● Partner with engineering teams to validate analytics implementations across environments and releases.
● Ensure analytics implementations meet data quality, privacy, security, and compliance standards.
Collaboration & Stakeholder Engagement
● Collaborate with product managers, marketers, developers, data engineers, and analytics leaders across the organization.
● Act as a trusted analytics advisor, providing clear technical direction and measurement strategies.
● Present insights, dashboards, and strategic recommendations to internal stakeholders and leadership.
● Assist in documenting best practices, implementation standards, and operational efficiencies within the digital analytics function.
Qualifications and Requirements
● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Marketing, or equivalent experience.
● This role aligns with Adobe Analytics, Customer Journey Analytics, and Adobe Experience Platform (Business Practitioner) certification paths. Certifications are considered an asset but are not required.
Experience
● 7+ years of experience in Digital Marketing Analytics, Data Analysis, or Data Science.
● 4+ years of hands-on experience with Adobe Analytics, including reporting and implementation.
● Experience with Adobe Customer Journey Analytics (CJA) and Adobe Experience Platform (AEP)
● strongly preferred.
● Experience working with global brands or large-scale digital ecosystems is an asset.
● Experience with Adobe Target is nice to have.
Technical Skills
● Strong experience with Adobe Analytics, Adobe Customer Journey Analytics (CJA), Adobe Launch (Tags), and Adobe Web SDK
● Experience designing and working with XDM schemas and event-based data models.
● Familiarity with Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) and how analytics integrates with content management platforms.
● Experience with SQL and strong understanding of data structures and database concepts.
● Knowledge of advanced analytics tools (e.g., Python) is a plus.
● Familiarity with session replay, heat mapping, and voice-of-customer tools.
Core Competencies
● Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills.
● Ability to manage multiple initiatives and priorities simultaneously.
● Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain complex analytics concepts clearly.
● Proven ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced, evolving environment.
● High attention to detail with a strong focus on data accuracy, quality, and governance.
Behavioral Skills:
● Leadership & Mentorship: Ability to lead by example and mentor junior developers, fostering an environment of growth and collaboration.
● Effective Communication: Clear and concise communication skills to effectively convey ideas, requirements, and feedback to the team, stakeholders, and clients.
● Problem-Solving Attitude: Proactively identifying challenges and developing innovative solutions to overcome them.
● Collaboration & Teamwork: Ability to work well within a team, encouraging collaboration and achieving high-quality results.
● Adaptability & Flexibility: Comfortable in a fast-paced, ever-changing environment, and willing to adapt to new frameworks and tools as needed.
What you’ll get in return:
Joining Taazaa Tech means thriving in a dynamic, innovative environment with competitive compensation and performance-based incentives. You'll have ample opportunities for professional growth through workshops and certifications, while enjoying a flexible work-life balance with remote options. Our collaborative culture fosters creativity and exposes you to diverse projects across various industries. We offer clear career advancement pathways, comprehensive health benefits, and perks like team-building activities.

We are seeking a highly skilled Senior/ with 7–9 years of experience to design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines and infrastructure. This role focuses on enabling analytics, operational reporting, and AI/ML workloads. You will collaborate closely with data analysts, data scientists, and engineering teams to ensure data availability, quality, and performance, while contributing to AI-enabled data products and ML pipeline development.
What you’ll do
Data Engineering & Pipeline Development
● Design, develop, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines for processing large datasets.
● Build data pipelines to ingest, transform, and load data into data lakes, warehouses, and feature stores.
● Optimise data workflows for performance, reliability, and scalability.
Data Integration & Management
● Integrate data from multiple sources, including APIs, databases, and file systems (JSON, CSV, Parquet).
● Manage relational and non-relational databases, including columnar databases like ClickHouse.
● Ensure efficient data storage and retrieval for both analytics and ML workloads.
Data Quality & Governance
● Implement data quality checks, validation frameworks, and monitoring systems.
● Maintain data lineage, metadata management, and governance standards.
● Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance for analytics and AI/ML use cases.
Cloud & Infrastructure
● Deploy and manage data solutions on cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) or on-prem environments.
● Work with cloud data services such as Redshift, Big Query, S3, RDS, and Azure Synapse.
● Monitor and optimise infrastructure for cost, performance, and scalability.
AI/ML Data Engineering
● Collaborate with data scientists to build and operationalise feature engineering pipelines.
● Develop and manage feature stores (e.g., Feast, Tecton).
● Support ML pipelines for training, batch processing, and real-time inference.
● Ensure proper dataset versioning, schema management, and data validation for ML workflows.
● Understand model monitoring, metadata tracking, and data drift concepts.
Collaboration & Stakeholder Engagement
● Work closely with cross-functional teams to understand business and technical requirements.
● Provide data-driven insights to support decision-making and product development.
● Contribute to building scalable, AI-driven data platforms.
Qualifications and Requirements
● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
Experience
● 7–9 years of experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role.
● Strong experience in building and maintaining ETL/ELT pipelines.
● Experience supporting analytics and AI/ML data workflows.
Technical Skills
● Hands-on experience with ETL tools such as Apache Airflow, Airbyte, and dbt.
● Strong expertise in SQL and NoSQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis).
● Proficiency in Python and Shell scripting for data processing and automation.
● Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and their data services.
● Familiarity with data warehousing solutions such as Amazon Redshift or Snowflake.
● Experience with containerization tools like Docker and orchestration using Kubernetes.
● Understanding of CI/CD pipelines for deploying data and ML workflows.
● Experience with BI tools (Power BI preferred).
Good to Have
● Experience with big data technologies like Hadoop, Spark, or Kafka.
● Familiarity with machine learning pipelines and feature engineering workflows.
● Experience with columnar databases such as ClickHouse.
● Exposure to vector databases (Pinecone, Chroma, pgvector).
● Experience working on AI/ML data platforms, feature stores, or LLM-based solutions.
Core Competencies
● Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
● Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities.
● Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
● High attention to detail and data quality.
● Ability to work in a fast-paced, evolving environment.
Behavioral Skills
● Leadership & Mentorship: Guide and mentor junior engineers, promoting best practices.
● Effective Communication: Clearly articulate technical concepts to stakeholders.
● Problem-Solving Attitude: Proactively identify issues and deliver solutions.
● Collaboration & Teamwork: Work effectively across teams to achieve shared goals.
● Adaptability & Flexibility: Stay updated with emerging technologies and adapt quickly.

• Extensive experience in using UX design best practices to design solutions, and a deep understanding of mobile-first and responsive design.
• Ability to clearly and effectively communicate design processes, ideas, and solutions to teams and clients.
• Experience working in a team setting including synthesizing abstract ideas into concrete design implications.

As a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) you will play a pivotal role in the design, implementation, and maintenance of the infrastructure that supports our software development lifecycle. You will work closely with software engineers, QA, and IT teams to ensure the availability, reliability, and performance of our systems. Your primary focus will be on streamlining our deployment processes, improving system scalability, and ensuring a robust, secure, and cost-efficient infrastructure.
What you’ll do:
Partner with product engineering squads to design, build, and operate highly reliable services
Own and improve production reliability end-to-end:
Define and measure SLOs/SLIs, error budgets, and reliability goals
Lead incident response, postmortems, and follow-up action items
Participate in on-call rotation and drive rapid, effective resolution of production issues
Build and maintain world-class observability:
Create comprehensive dashboards, alerts, metrics, structured logging, and distributed tracing
Enable squads to understand system behavior and debug effectively
Develop automation, tooling, and infrastructure as code to reduce toil and increase developer velocity
Collaborate closely with Staff Engineers / Team Leads to:
Embed reliability best practices into the development lifecycle
Review architectural decisions with a production lens
Mentor engineers on operational excellence, observability, and on-call mindset
Champion modern engineering and DevOps practices:
CI/CD pipelines
Progressive delivery (feature flags, canaries, blue-green)
Infrastructure as code (Terraform, Pulumi, CDK)
Effective use of AI-assisted tools to accelerate scripting, debugging, and documentation
Proactively identify and eliminate classes of failure through chaos engineering, capacity planning, and performance tuning
Help evolve our technical strategy for reliability, scalability, and cost-efficiency
Your Qualifications:
Technical:
5+ years of professional experience in SRE, DevOps, or software engineering with a strong focus on production systems
Deep hands-on experience operating distributed cloud systems (AWS / GCP / Azure — at least one in depth, preferably AWS)
Proficiency in at least one modern programming language used for tooling & automation (Go, Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, Rust)
Strong observability expertise:
Building dashboards and alerts (Grafana, Groundcover, Datadog, New Relic, Prometheus, etc.)
Distributed tracing (OpenTelemetry, Jaeger, Zipkin)
Structured logging and metrics at scale
Proven track record of incident management, postmortems, and driving reliability improvements
Experience defining and working with SLOs, SLIs, and error budgets
Comfort with infrastructure as code and modern DevOps practices (CI/CD, GitOps, containers/Kubernetes)
Excellent collaboration skills — you enjoy partnering with product engineers and teaching reliability concepts
Bias toward automation and reducing manual toil
Nice-to-Haves
Previous on-call leadership or incident commander experience
Background in performance engineering or capacity planning at scale
Familiarity with service meshes, API gateways, or zero-trust networking
Contributions to open-source reliability/observability tools
Experience mentoring or embedding within product squads within product squads

We are seeking an experienced AEM Tech Lead / Senior Developer with 6–12 years of overall experience, including 6–8 years of hands-on expertise in Adobe Experience Manager (AEM 6.5 / AEM as a Cloud Service). The ideal candidate should have strong Java/J2EE development skills and deep knowledge of AEM components such as Edge Delivery Services, Templates, Core Components, and headless implementations. Proficiency in JCR, Sling, OSGi, REST/GraphQL APIs, and front-end technologies like HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and modern frameworks (Vue.js/AngularJS) is essential. Experience with Adobe Marketing Cloud tools, CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, Maven), and enterprise-scale multilingual site development is highly valued. Exposure to CCMS projects using AEM Guides and DITA, along with experience in solution design, PoCs, and proposal preparation, will be a strong advantage.
What you’ll do:
·      Lead AEM Development: Design, develop, and implement scalable AEM solutions (AEM 6.5 / AEMaaCS) including templates, components, workflows, and integrations.
·      Architect and Optimize Solutions: Define architecture, ensure performance, security, and scalability of AEM-based applications, and implement best coding practices.
·      Collaborate with Cross-Functional Teams: Work closely with UI developers, backend engineers, DevOps, and business stakeholders to deliver high-quality digital experiences.
·      Integrate Adobe Ecosystem: Implement and manage integrations with Adobe Marketing Cloud tools such as Analytics, Target, Launch, and Adobe I/O.
·      Mentor and Review: Provide technical guidance to the development team, conduct code reviews, and support solution design, estimations, and PoCs for new initiatives
Your qualifications
Technical
6-8 years of experience in developing and implementing Adobe AEM 6.5 / AEMaaCS (AEM as a Cloud Service) in large scale environments.
8-10 years of strong Java / J2EE development hands on experience.
Strong technical expertise and experience with AEM building blocks including Edge Delivery Services (EDS), Templates, Core components, Style System, Policies, Dialogs, Bundles, Experience Fragments, Content Fragments, headless endpoints.
Deep knowledge and understanding of the following: JCR, Apache Sling, Apache Felix, OSGi, REST / GraphQL API, Groovy, Javascript, Front-end Frameworks, SPA, JSON, HTML5, CSS3.
Experience in User Interface development using HTML5, XHTML, CSS3, TypeScript. JavaScript, Vue JS, AngularJS, jQuery, Bootstrap, JSON, XML and AJAX will be a plus.

Full-Time
We’re looking for a QA Automation Engineer to join our Engineering team.
We are seeking a QA Automation Engineer with expertise in Playwright with JavaScript and API testing. The ideal candidate will have strong experience designing and implementing automation frameworks, executing end-to-end tests, and improving overall product quality. A proactive mindset and strong problem-solving abilities are essential to succeed in this role.
What you’ll do
3–6 years of experience in software quality assurance and automation testing.
Design, develop, and maintain test automation frameworks using Playwright with JavaScript/TypeScript.
Automate UI and end-to-end test scenarios for web applications.
Perform API testing using tools such as Postman, REST Assured, or automated scripts.
Develop and maintain automated regression test suites.
Integrate automated test suites with CI/CD pipelines.
Identify, report, and track defects through their lifecycle.
Collaborate with developers, product managers, and QA teams to ensure high product quality.
Participate in test planning, test design, and test execution.
Contribute to performance testing using tools such as k6, JMeter, or similar.
Take initiative to improve test coverage, automation frameworks, and quality processes.
Your qualifications
Technical
Strong experience with Playwright automation using JavaScript/TypeScript.
Solid understanding of API testing concepts (REST APIs).
Experience designing and maintaining automation frameworks and test design patterns.
Familiarity with CI/CD tools such as GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or GitLab CI.
Good understanding of SDLC, STLC, and Agile methodologies.
Experience using test management and defect tracking tools like Jira.
Exposure to performance testing tools such as k6, JMeter, or similar is a plus.
Experience with BDD frameworks such as Cucumber is a plus.
Behavioural
Here are four essential behavioural skills a QA Automation Engineer should possess:
Effective Communication: Clearly communicate testing requirements, defects, and quality insights with developers, product managers, and stakeholders.
Problem-Solving Mindset: Analyze issues effectively and develop efficient solutions to improve test coverage and product quality.
Collaboration and Teamwork: Work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless delivery of reliable and high-performing applications.
Ownership and Proactiveness: Take initiative in improving automation frameworks, processes, and overall product quality.
Joining our team means working in a dynamic, innovation-driven environment with competitive compensation and performance-based incentives. You will have opportunities to expand your expertise in automation testing through workshops and hands-on experience with modern QA tools and technologies.
We promote a collaborative culture where creativity and quality are highly valued. You will gain exposure to diverse projects, clear career growth opportunities, comprehensive benefits, and engaging team activities that make work both rewarding and enjoyable.
We are a team passionate about building high-quality software solutions through collaboration, innovation, and a strong engineering culture. Our focus is on delivering reliable, scalable products while continuously improving our development and testing practices.
